title: Christmas Wrapping Paper 3 Rolls x 20M Presents Gift Wrap Xmas Party - 60 Metres Total
features: 3 Rolls of 20M cute Christmas gift wrapping paper

This cute Christmas gift wrapping paper comes in three assorted festive designs which is suitable for all your family and friends. Featuring a mix of cute Character designs, Santa, reindeer, penguin, HoHoHo.
Each roll is a lengthy 20M x 70cm wide giving you a huge 60M worth of wrapping paper ensuring you won't run out of paper this year. Perfect for every gift, no mater how big or small.

Our paper is also fully recyclable to! Helping you to do your part in being eco friendly all year round. With the unisex designs suitable for adults and children, this set of paper is a must have for your gift wrapping collection this year.
